channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Watches, movies and burrito taxis: How Americans splurge in a vibecession
item.description: Despite financial strain, Americans indulge in small luxuries as economic anxiety and inflation delay major purchases.

item.title: Campaigns face higher costs as America becomes more secular
item.description: The fastest-growing religious group in the U.S., the religiously unaffiliated, is also one of the hardest and most expensive to reach.

item.title: Pope Leo warns AI could distort humanity in five key ways
item.description: Pope Leo XIV cautions that the race for artificial intelligence may become a modern Tower of Babel, concentrating power and distorting human values.

item.title: Oil prices fall on signs of potential U.S.-Iran agreement
item.description: Crude oil dropped about $5 per barrel Sunday evening after initial reports emerged of a tentative deal between the U.S. and Iran.
